headline: Stable positive sentiment (score: +11.1)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 98% over 7 days (strong momentum)
Alert: Overall sentiment has significantly increased (z=2.23)
sentiment_commentary:
• Fears leads today but at -29.3 it actually reflects quieter-than-usual anxiety, despite 65 quotes with 23 at strong intensity — the score sits in the lower half of its 162-day range.
• Frustrations dropped sharply from yesterday's 98.0 to 17.8, though its 119 quotes and 82 strong-intensity hits suggest people are still venting — the volume just didn't translate into the same spike.
• Optimism nearly broke even at -0.4, recovering from yesterday's -18.4 and nudging toward the top of its historical range.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
